extDesc.message: A link shortener that actually shortens links. Strips tracking junk from URLs in place. For clean shareable links.

statsLine.message: $1 URLs cleaned on this device · $2 characters of junk removed

tipUtmStrip.message: Strips utm_*, gclid, fbclid, etc. from every URL on every site. Asks for the broader permission when you turn it on, and hands it back when you turn it off.

tipRedirectSkip.message: When you click a link wrapped by a click-tracker, social outbound wrapper, affiliate wrapper, or AMP viewer, go straight to the real destination. The target is read from the link itself, never fetched. Corporate SafeLinks are deliberately not skipped.

filterEmpty.message: No sites match. The full list also lives on the project page.

infoMain.message: Long URLs on supported sites are rewritten in place. Right-click any link or page and choose "Copy clean URL" for a one-off cleanup, or use "Copy link address" on Amazon to get the clean form directly. The "Universal tracking strip" toggle (off by default) strips common trackers like utm_* from URLs on every site you visit.

infoSelection.message: Selected a URL as text? Right-click it for "Copy clean URL from selection". Or in the address bar, type clean, press Tab, and paste a URL to jump to its clean form.

tipShortcut.message: Tip: $1 copies a clean URL of the current page. Rebind it in your browser's extension shortcut settings.

tipShortcutUnset.message: Tip: the copy-clean-URL keyboard shortcut is not set (another extension may have claimed it). Assign one in your browser's extension shortcut settings.

optSubtitle.message: Fine-tune the Universal tracking strip, check your local stats, and back up your settings.

optStripIntro.message: These settings only matter when the Universal tracking strip toggle is on. Per-site cleanup (Amazon, eBay, etc.) is unaffected.

optStripOff.message: Universal tracking strip is OFF. Settings below take effect once you enable the toggle in the toolbar popup.

statsHint.message: Counted locally in this browser profile only. Stats are never synced and never leave your device, like everything else in this extension.

backupHint.message: Export every setting (toggles, skip domains, kept parameters) as a JSON file, or import one exported earlier. Useful when moving to a browser profile that doesn't share your sync account.

bulkSubtitle.message: Paste anything. Every link inside is cleaned and unwrapped, right here on your device.

bulkHint.message: Works on whole emails, documents, or lists of links. Each URL runs through the same pipeline as the right-click menu: tracking redirectors are unwrapped, per-site rules apply, and universal trackers are stripped. The text around your links is untouched, and nothing is sent anywhere.
